items.name: Spoopy Ghost Shoulder Pet – Cute & Spooky 👻
items.description:
Bring some playful spookiness wherever you go with the Spoopy Ghost Shoulder Pet! 👻✨
This adorable little ghost hovers by your side, perfect for fans of cute Halloween vibes and ghostly companions. Whether you’re trick-or-treating in Roblox, exploring spooky games, or just want a floating friend, this ghost is always ready for fun.

Friendly, not scary 👻

Great for Halloween and year-round play 🎃

Matches with spooky outfits & costumes 🕸️

Fun, and full of spoopy style!

Let your new ghost buddy follow you everywhere—because spooky can be cute too! 💜

Add festive charm to your avatar with the Mini Christmas Tree – Right Shoulder Companion 🎄✨
This adorable mini tree sits comfortably on your right shoulder, decorated with holiday ornaments and a bright star topper. Perfect for Christmas outfits, winter roleplay, and seasonal events. Pair it with the left shoulder version for a complete festive look!
